criteria_results.description: POST /api/auth/register creates an entry in data/users.json with a bcrypt-hashed passwordHash field (starts with '$2b$') and returns HTTP 201 with {id, username}.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (line 28) hashes with bcrypt.hash(password, 10). server/fileStorage.ts (lines 68-79) saves the user object to users.json via flushUsers().

criteria_results.description: GET /api/auth/me returns HTTP 401 with no session cookie, and HTTP 200 with {id, username} after POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials sets a session.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 53-61) checks req.isAuthenticated() and returns 401 or user object. server/auth.ts configures passport-local and session middleware.

criteria_results.description: GET /api/projects as user A does not return user B's project unless B's project has A's userId in its sharedWith array in data/projects.json.
criteria_results.evidence: server/fileStorage.ts (lines 87-91) filters projects in listProjectsForUser by ownerId or presence in sharedWith array.

criteria_results.description: PUT /api/projects/:id writes a valid JSON file to data/project-states/{id}.json containing a 'layers' array key and no 'pdfFile' key.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (line 84) validates against projectStateSchema. shared/schema.ts (lines 24-33) defines projectStateSchema with 'layers' and without 'pdfFile'. server/fileStorage.ts (line 130) writes this to disk.

criteria_results.description: POST /api/files accepts multipart/form-data with field 'file', saves the binary to data/files/{fileId}, writes metadata JSON to data/files/{fileId}.meta.json, and returns {fileId, url}.
criteria_results.evidence: server/routes.ts (lines 135-141) handles file upload and calls storage.saveFile. server/fileStorage.ts (lines 134-147) saves both binary and metadata files.

criteria_results.description: client/src/App.tsx renders AuthPage when useCurrentUser() returns null and renders the editor Router when user is non-null.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/App.tsx (lines 63-71) redirects to /auth if user is null, and wraps Router in EditorProvider if user is present (lines 74-81).

criteria_results.description: client/src/hooks/useAutoSave.ts exports useAutoSave() that guards on docState.projectId !== null before calling PUT /api/projects/:id, with a debounce delay of 2000ms.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/hooks/useAutoSave.ts (line 12) has the projectId guard and (line 36) has the 2000ms timeout.

criteria_results.description: DocumentState in client/src/lib/types.ts contains projectId: string|null, pdfFileId: string|null, and overlayPdfFileId: string|null fields.
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/lib/types.ts (lines 48-50) contains the three requested fields with string | null types.

suggestions: Consider adding a mechanism to clean up orphaned files in data/files/ when a project is deleted or files are replaced.
The useAutoSave hook sends the entire project state every 2 seconds; for very large projects, a more granular update or longer debounce might be needed.
next_focus: The task is completed and verified. No further actions required for this task.
